description: 日本語のメッセージを検出します。Japanese is handled by the CJK tokenizer path (Aho-Corasick automaton + bigram fallback for kanji/kana), not the Latin whitespace tokenizer. Expected accuracy: excellent — Japanese hiragana, katakana, and kanji are fully distinct from all other languages in this pack. Hiragana particles (は、が、を、に、で、から、まで) and common endings (ます、です、ました、ません) are strong signals. No overlap possible with Latin-script intents.
